summary: Tested all features: 1) INBOX EMAIL PROMPT - Backend /api/messages/conversation/{id}/info now returns contact_email field, frontend loadContactInfo fetches and uses it correctly. When switching to Email mode for contact WITH email, prompt does NOT appear (correct behavior). 2) CONGRATS CARD - 'Create Congrats Card' menu item exists under Templates & Branding section in More tab. Navigation to /settings/create-congrats works. Form has photo picker, customer name, phone, message fields and create button. 3) FormData photo handling fix verified in both thread/[id].tsx and create-congrats.tsx - uses fetch+blob conversion on web.
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: 1) Email prompt logic - backend returns contact_email in conversation info endpoint, frontend uses hasEmail = !!(contact_email || savedContactEmail) to determine if prompt should show. Tested with 'Baby' contact who has email jessica_bills3232@hotmail.com - prompt correctly did NOT appear when switching to Email mode. 2) Create Congrats Card - accessible from More > Templates & Branding > Create Congrats Card. Form at /settings/create-congrats has all required fields. 3) FormData fix - both thread/[id].tsx (line 925-929) and create-congrats.tsx (line 95-98) use fetch+blob conversion for web photo uploads.
